_note: 6mo-M1 #7 — SINGLE canonical source for tier APY/drawdown BAND label strings. Every surface (packages.astro, SiteHeader nav, index fallback) imports from here so the bands can never diverge (they did: SiteHeader said Preserve 6–8% while /packages said Conservative 2–6% — the 6–8% overstated the ~3.3% evidenced conservative book).
